mechanics.excerpt: Savage Clan assaults claimed world after world; by the time the Clans signed the Truce of Tukayyid in 3052 the Republic had shrunk from eighty-four worids to seven and the KungsArme (Republic military) had fallen twenty-Six regi- ments from 206_ The current Elected Prince Regent, Christian Mansdotter; has greatly increased the military'$ size and less ened the general dislike of mercenaries but he is facing new problems Having lost Terra the Word of Blake in 3058 ComStar moved its base of operations t0 the Republic mutu- Taurian Concordat The Concordat; Iarge realm with stable economy and coherent military force_ most closely resembles an Inner Sphere power: Of all the Periphery realms_ the Concordat is viewed with the most respect by the Inner Sphere.
